case_title: SASSER DARREN VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SASSER DARREN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY SASSER DARREN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-10-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY
